nasb.text: Behind the door and the doorpost You have set up your sign; Indeed, far removed from Me, you have uncovered yourself, And have gone up and made your bed wide. And you have made an agreement for yourself with them, You have loved their bed, You have looked on their manhood.

esv.text: Behind the door and the doorpost you have set up your memorial; for, deserting me, you have uncovered your bed, you have gone up to it, you have made it wide; and you have made a covenant for yourself with them, you have loved their bed, you have looked on nakedness.

cnv.text: 你在門後，在門框後， 安設了外族神的記號； 你遠離了我，裸露了自己， 就上床去，又擴張你的床， 你也與他們立約； 你愛他們的床， 看他們的下體。

ccb.text: 在门后供奉神像。 你们背弃我， 脱衣上床跟它们肆意苟合， 与它们立约， 迷恋它们的床， 爱看它们的淫态。

csbs.text: 你在门和门柱后面安设你的标记； 你离弃我，裸体上床，扩宽你的床； 你与它们立约， 你爱它们的床，盯看它们的下体。
